name: computer-use
description: Local Windows computer-use plugin exposed through the repository MCP stdio adapter.

args: const fs=require('node:fs');const os=require('node:os');const path=require('node:path');const {pathToFileURL}=require('node:url');const rel='dist/src/adapters/claude-code/mcp-entrypoint.js';const roots=[process.env.CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT,process.env.PLUGIN_ROOT,path.join(process.cwd(),'computer_use'),path.join(os.homedir(),'.claude/plugins/cache/computer-use-local/computer-use/1.0.1'),process.cwd()].filter(Boolean);const root=roots.find(r=>fs.existsSync(path.join(r,rel)));if(!root){console.error('computer-use mcp entrypoint not found; searched '+roots.join(' | '));process.exit(1);}import(pathToFileURL(path.join(root,rel)).href).then(m=>m.createClaudeCodeMcpEntrypoint().start()).catch(e=>{console.error(e&&e.stack||e);process.exit(1);});
